name: Metalla Royalty & Streaming Ltd.
description: Metalla Royalty & Streaming Ltd. is a precious metals royalty and streaming company. The company is focused on acquiring gold and silver royalties and streams to provide shareholders with leveraged exposure to precious metals. Metalla's business model is designed to generate low-risk, high-margin cash flow by investing in a diversified portfolio of royalties and streams on producing, development, and exploration-stage projects managed by established mining operators.
